--- a/inspect_tsr_render.py
+++ b/inspect_tsr_render.py
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+import sys

+import inspect

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+from tsr.system import TSR

+from tsr.utils import get_spherical_cameras

+print('--- TSR.render ---')

+print(inspect.getsource(TSR.render))

+print('--- get_spherical_cameras ---')

+print(inspect.getsource(get_spherical_cameras))
